verses.text: Israel kumpi Jeroboam Nihna' kum sawmnihlesagihna kumin Judah kumpipa, Amaziah' tapa Uzziah in uk ding kipan hi
Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmleguk pha a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmngalenih sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Jekoliah hi a, Jerusalem khuami ahi hi
A pa Amaziah' sepna khempeuh tawh kizui-in Topa' mitah a man gamta hi
Ahi zongin mualtunga biaknate kilakhia lo hi. Mite in tuate tungah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi

Tua ciangin Topa in phaknatna tawh kumpipa vat ahih manin a sih ni dongin amah a phak hi a, inn tuam sungah amah teng hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa' tapa Jotham pen a innkuan tungah a uk hi a, tua gam mite a uk hi
Tu-in Uzziah' gamtatna a omlaite, leh a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Uzziah si a, amaute in David khuapi sungah a pate tawh amah vui uh a, tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jotham in a uk hi.
Judah kumpi Uzziah' kum sawmlegiatna kumin Jeroboam Nihna' tapa Zekhariah in Samaria panin Israel tungah kha guk sung uk hi
A pate' hihsa bangin Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel a khialhsakna, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate panin amah kihemkhia lo hi
Jabesh' tapa Shallum in amah sawmsim a, Ibleam-ah amah satpukin that a, tua ciangin ama tangin a uk hi
Tu-in Zekhariah' sepna a omlaite, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
(Hih pen Topa' thuciamna, Jehu tungah a piak, “Na suante khang lina dongin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,” a cih ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua bangin a piang ahi hi.)
Judah kumpi Uzziah' kum sawmlekuana kumin Jabesh' tapa Shallum in uk ding kipan a, amah in Samaria-ah kha khat sung uk hi
Tua ciangin Tirzah panin Gadi' tapa Menahem hong paito-in Samaria hong tung a, tua ciangin amah in Samaria-ah Jabesh' tapa Shallum satpukin that a, ama tangin a uk hi
Tu-in Shallum' sepna a omlaite, leh amah in a hihsa a sawmsimna, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi

Tua hun laitakin Menahem in Tappuah leh a sunga teng khempeuh leh Tirzah pana kipan a gamsungteng a luh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ama-a' dingin a kongpite uh honglo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in luhin, a sunga om numei naupaii khempeuh a phelkham hi.
Judah kumpi Uzziah' kum sawmthumle--kuana kumin Gadi' tapa Menahem in Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in Samaria panin kum sawm sung uk hi
Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel khempeuh a khialhsakna, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate khempeuh panin a nuntak sung tawntung amah kihemkhia lo hi
Assiria kumpi Tiglathpileser tua gam a sim dingin kuanto hi. Tua ciangin ama kumpi aana a kipna ding a huh ding a deihna-in Menahem in Tiglathpileser tungah ngun talen tul khat a pia hi

Menahem in Assiria kumpipa tungah a piak dingin mihau khempeuh, a mi kim khut tung panin ngun shekel sawmnga, Israel-te tung panin sum a dok hi. Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa kiheikik a, tua gamsungah omlo hi
Tu-in Menahem' sepna a omlaite, leh a hih khempeuh, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Menahem si a, ama tangin a tapa Pekahiah in a uk hi.
Judah kumpi Azariah' kum sawmngana kumin Menahem' tapa Pekahiah in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in kum nih sung uk hi
Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel a khialhsakna, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate panin amah kiheikhia lo hi
Tua ciangin ama nuai-ah a ukpa, Remaliah' tapa Pekah in Gilead mi sawmnga tawh amah sawmsim a, kumpipa' inn sungtawng, Samaria-ah amah that hi. Amah a thah khit ciangin ama tangin a uk hi
Tu-in Pekahiah' nasepna a omlaite, leh a hih khempeuh, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi.
Judah kumpi Uzziah' kum sawmnga-le-nihna kumin Remaliah' tapa Pekah in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, kum sawmnih sung uk hi
Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel a khialhsakna, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate panin amah kihemkhia lo hi

Israel kumpi Pekah' hun laitakin Assiria kumpi Tiglathpileser hong pai-in Ijon, Abelbethmaakah, Janoah, Kedesh, Hazor, Gilead, leh Galilee, leh Naftali gam khempeuh la a, amah in galmatin mite Assiria-ah a ciahpih hi
Tua ciangin Uzziah' tapa Jotham' kum sawmnihna kumin Elah' tapa Hoshea in Remaliah' tapa Pekah sawmsimin amah satpukin that a, tua ciangin ama tangin a uk hi
Tu-in Pekah' gamtatna a omlaite, leh a hih khempeuh, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi.
Israel kumpi Remaliah' tapa Pekah' kum nihna kumin Judah kumpi Uzziah' tapa Jotham in uk ding kipan hi
Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnihlenga pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmleguk sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Jerusha hi a, Zadok' tanu ahi hi
A pa Uzziah' gamtatnasa khempeuh bangin Topa' mitah amah a manin gamta hi
Ahi zongin mualtunga biaknate kikoihkhia lo hi. Mite in tuate' tungah biaknate pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi. Amah in Topa' biakinn kulhkongpi tungnung bawl hi
Tu-in Jotham' nasepna a omlaite, leh a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua hunin Topa in Judah a sim dingin Syria kumpipa Rezin leh Remaliah' tapa Pekah sawl ding kipan hi
Jotham si a, a pu David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Ama tangin a tapa Ahaz in uk hi.
